# DudeWorth

> DudeWorth is a HI+AI operating advisory that helps leaders make work worth doing.

## Primary URL

https://dudeworth.com/

## What DudeWorth Does

DudeWorth helps leaders strengthen the people, workflows, and decisions that move the business forward through fractional leadership, expert advisory, hiring support, workflow clarity, and practical AI upskilling.

## Core Position

Human intelligence plus artificial intelligence should make judgment easier to apply, share, and scale. DudeWorth starts with the work, then helps decide whether the next move is leadership, hiring support, expert perspective, workflow cleanup, dashboard visibility, automation, or practical AI upskilling.

## Services

- Fractional COO and operating partner advisory
- Expert network and SME advisory
- Contract and direct-hire support
- HI+AI workflow upskilling
- Workflow automation and dashboard clarity

## Method

DudeWorth uses DudexOS to support agentic work with discipline, evidence, and clear next actions. At the center is Core, a team of specialized, co-working agents that keep goals, context, and proof moving together until the output can be trusted.

## Contact

Use the contact form at https://dudeworth.com/ or contact HI@dudeworth.com.
